task_description: Sprint 4: Implement resume-after-crash (checkpoint-based translation progress persistence) and full session persistence across app sessions. Feature 3 (checkpoint/resume) must be implemented first as Feature 7 (session persistence) builds on it.

verification.summary: All 264 tests pass (219 original + 14 checkpoint + 27 session + 4 review-fix tests). Code reviewed and critical race condition fixed. No regressions.
